name: JosiCat Cat Wet Food - Beef Alutray 100g
description: Formulated with essential vitamins and carefully selected nutrients, JosiCat Pâté with Beef supports overall wellbeing, strong bones, healthy digestion, and a shiny coat. Added vitamin E helps protect cells from oxidative stress, while vitamin D3 contributes to healthy bone development. Prebiotic inulin promotes healthy gut flora, and biotin, zinc, and copper help maintain healthy skin and a glossy coat. The practical 100g serving size makes feeding easy and convenient, whether served as a full meal or alongside dry food. With no unnecessary extras, this tasty wet food offers wholesome daily nutrition cats will love. Key Benefits Complete wet food for adult cats Delicious beef flavour in a smooth pâté texture Helps support healthy digestion with prebiotic inulin Enriched with vitamins E and D3 for overall health support Supports healthy skin and a shiny coat with biotin, zinc, and copper Convenient 100g single-serve pouch for freshness and portion control Provides additional moisture to support daily hydration Composition Meat and animal derivatives (beef 4.0%), minerals, derivatives of vegetable origin (inulin 0.40%). Analytical Constituents Protein: 11.0% Fat Content: 4.5% Crude Fibre: 0.3% Crude Ash: 2.0%
